arts.ttl: Team News: Nottingham Forest vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Nottingham Forest and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: 'Could be': Arsenal told about the manager they could appoint if they actually sacked Mikel Arteta one day
Arsenal training detail from Dubai emerges to ramp up Mikel Arteta fury after transfer call
arts.sum: After the success of last season's Dubai trip - with the Gunners going on a storming run during the business end of the campaign - it was thought that Arteta's side could benefit from another trip to the Gulf state. On the back of the 2024 visit, Arsenal emphasised that this campaign's trip was considered into the budget and the players, staff and everyone had a great time and saw the benefit, both from a bonding and a training point of view.

arts.ttl: Callum Hudson-Odoi tipped him to be a star in 2019, now he can’t even get a game for Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: It's not worked out the way he thought...

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest plot £8m raid on Arsenal as Edu links bear fruit
Ethan Nwaneri decision made as £45m star drops out: Arsenal predicted XI v Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Arsenal will hope to bounce back immediately from their weekend Premier League defeat when they take on Nottingham Forest on Wednesday night. Arsenal saw their...

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed MAJOR update as Florian Wirtz race heats up
arts.sum: While Arsenal could intensify their pursuit of Guler amid reports that Real Madrid may be tempted into a sale this summer, they are unlikely to sign Wirtz as he yearns for a transfer to Man City, according to Fichajes. Bayern Munich have reportedly expressed their interest in signing Real Madrid midfielder Arda Guler after admitting defeat in the race for Florian Wirtz ’s signature.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot: Liverpool's "regimental" but "genius" manager can complete 36-year Arsenal revenge mission
arts.sum: Arne Slot will be "right up there" with the best Liverpool managers if he can steer the Reds to Premier League glory, former Reds striker John Aldridge believes.

arts.ttl: 'Appalling' Arsenal superstar has 'not been good enough at all' this season as the Gunners look set to come up short in Premier League title race, claims ex-Tottenham striker
arts.sum: The Arsenal skipper has come in for criticism after his display in the Gunners' 1-0 home defeat by West Ham , which looks to have ended any hope of the side claiming the Premier League this term.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest willing to offer £8m midfielder in swap deal for star praised by Jorginho
